title: xyris formosana
intro: Xyris formosana, also known as the Taiwanese yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Xyris formosana are thought to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Xyris formosana typically involve infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's roots and rhizomes to create a decoction.
